title: flaveria angustifolia
intro: Flaveria angustifolia, also known as the narrowleaf flaveria, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Flaveria angustifolia can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for use in herbal remedies, though further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
